description: Single source of truth for project-relative agent-skill install paths and the MCP-client to skill-target mapping. Consumed by the Hub wizard (hub/src-tauri/src/config/mcp_config.rs) and unity_open_mcp_generate_skill (mcp-server/src/skill/generate-skill.ts). To add or rename a client, edit this file — do not hand-maintain duplicate constants in Rust or TypeScript.
